articles.title: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon's ban
articles.description: After Anthropic's weeks-long standoff with the Pentagon, the company won one milestone: A judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit, which sought to reverse its government blacklisting while the judicial process plays out. "The Department of War's records show that it designated Anthropic as a supply chain risk because of its 'hostile manner […]
articles.author: Hayden Field
